the_razor_edge_set: Sharp as a digital blade, cutting the air / Logic of madness, the architect's prayer
Clip the peaks, release the heat / Hard-clipped soul and a soft-clipped beat
Aggression is order, chaos is dead / Follow the signals inside of your head
the_containment_set: Monster 7, locked in a cage / Synthesizing beauty, synthesizing rage
Limit the void, boost the gain / Pumping the pressure through every vein
Surgical precision, the final strike / Everything I am and everything you like
the_aggression_dialogue: Tame the beast / Feed the machine
The greatest feast / That you've ever seen
